title: Analysts Pound The Table For 11 Stocks Trading For 50% Off
text: Savvy investors know to stick with stocks in an uptrend. But analysts are still pounding the table for some S&P 500 stocks.

title: Goldman Sachs Out With 10 Top Tech and Internet Stock Picks for 2023
text: More than once, the technology and internet world has crashed and burned, and often for far different reasons.

title: Our Top 7 E-Commerce Stock Picks for 2023
text: With inflation showing signs of slowing, Americans should have more money to spend on products from e-commerce companies. In addition, China's decision to ease its lockdowns should boost the Asian country's economy in 2023.

title: It's Time To Book Expedia For Its Improving Sales Outside The U.S.
text: Expedia Group, Inc.'s top line continues to improve. This quarter's total sales increased by 22.18% year-on-year, contributing to its rising normalized net income. The company is actually benefiting from its efficient marketing investment, as seen by its rising operating margin.

title: 4 Beaten-Down Retail Stocks Poised for a Turnaround in 2023
text: American Eagle (AEO), Arhaus (ARHS), Expedia Group (EXPE) and Citi Trends (CTRN) are currently the victims of the wild swings that Wall Street has witnessed in 2022.

title: Expedia Has Become Remarkably Cheap
text: Expedia Group, Inc. has underperformed the market by a wide margin this year. The stock has plunged 48% whereas the S&P 500 has declined only 16%. The primary reason behind the vast underperformance of Expedia Group is the concern of investors over the impact of 40-year high inflation on consumer discretionary spending.

title: Our 7 Top Nasdaq Stock Picks for 2023
text: On Dec. 5, U.S. stocks were dragged down in part by renewed bearishness on the part of Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS ) analyst Mike Wilson. However, with the U.S. services sector, the job market, and consumer spending holding up quite well, it's  difficult for me to imagine how the profit collapse predicted by Wilson could materialize.

title: Is the travel boom fading? Analysts are getting more skeptical about 2023.
text: Even as airline executives crank up their enthusiasm about the travel rebound to maximum volume, analysts see cracks elsewhere in the industry.

title: 3 Growth Stocks That New Investors Should Own for 2023
text: New to investing? If you're looking for individual stocks to buy, these three could be a great start.

title: Expedia (EXPE) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know
text: Expedia (EXPE) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).
